productDisplayName: Marvel Boys Red and Black Sandals
description: Style Note Gear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of floaters from Spider-Man. Its cushioned footbed and grooved outsole let him stay on his feet all day long. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for an outing in the park. Product Details Black and silver synthetic leather straps on the forefoot, midfoot and backfoot, with a padded fabric inner lining Velcro closures on the forefoot and midfoot straps with branding Ergonomically curved red footbed with grooves for grip TPU outsole with grooves for absolute grip and traction Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteGear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of floaters from Spider-Man.
